## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Apr 16, 2026 - Jun 4, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _00988776_, Jun 4, 2026, 1/5: "I got this app with high hopes, but it very quickly proved me wrong. The app is very cute and I love the stickers you can add to the planner and the different templates but I kept having the issue of templates not loading and when I wrote on the templates it kept moving the writing all around the screen. I also had the issue of it freezing randomly when I tried to switch between stickers and writing. I don’t know if this was caused because I was using the free versions but I feel disheartened to leave this reply."
            2. _Simbecutiepie_, Apr 17, 2026, 3/5: "It is honestly a very good app overall, but it crashes every time I try to add a new layer, which means I can’t write on a few"
